title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Quikr - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Quikr - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quikr family as a Backend Developer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quikr:
Quikr is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr!
